title: Force Sensing Overview
description:
Force Sensing Overview

Force Sensing

Note:  This option allows you to measure force and enable a stop trigger by force using ATI Force Sensor.  This is available in EPSON RC+ 7.0 Ver.7.2.0 or later version, however, this option is for EPSON RC+ 7.0 Ver.7.2.0 or before version.

EPSON RC+ 7.0 Ver.7.2.0 or later version supports "Force Guide 7.0" that measures, controls, and triggers force by using Epson Force Sensor.

For details on Force Guide 7.0, refer to the following manual.

EPSON RC+ 7.0 option  Force Guide 7.0
